mapper.select: SELECT fr.friend_request_id AS friend_request_id, r.member_id AS member_id, r.email AS email, r.nickname AS nickname, fr.status AS status FROM friend_request fr JOIN member r ON r.member_id = fr.sender_id WHERE fr.receiver_id = #{memberId} AND fr.status = 'PENDING' AND r.status != 'SOFT_DELETE' ORDER BY fr.created_at DESC

SELECT fr.friend_request_id AS friend_request_id, r.member_id AS member_id, r.email AS email, r.nickname AS nickname, fr.status AS status FROM friend_request fr JOIN member r ON r.member_id = fr.receiver_id WHERE fr.sender_id = #{memberId} AND fr.status = 'PENDING' AND r.status != 'SOFT_DELETE' ORDER BY fr.created_at DESC

SELECT friend_request_id AS friendRequestId, sender_id AS senderId, receiver_id AS receiverId, status AS status, created_at AS createdAt, responded_at AS respondedAt FROM friend_request WHERE friend_request_id = #{friendRequestId} AND receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND status = 'PENDING'
SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM friend_request WHERE ( (sender_id = #{senderId} AND receiver_id = #{receiverId}) OR (sender_id = #{receiverId} AND receiver_id = #{senderId}) ) AND status = 'PENDING' )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FRIEND_REQUEST (sender_id, receiver_id, status, created_at) VALUES (#{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{status}, #{createdAt})
